notes: Case 01-35 (docketed 2001) is a Complaint case: RE Moon K. Ham, et al. vs. Korean Capital Presbytery. Listed on GA30 (2002) p. 110 in the judicial cases docket and mentioned on p. 111 as one of the cases the SJC completed its work on. However, no decision opinion text is provided in the report section - only the docket entry and status indication are present. The detailed decision for this case does not appear in the extracted GA minutes.
